name: Orak Orik (Cabbage Scramble)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok.
2. Add the onion, garlic, shrimp, salt, and pepper.
3. Stir-fry until the onions are translucent.
4. Mix in the cabbage.
5. Add the eggs.
6. Cook, stirring, until the eggs are set.
7. Transfer to serving dish and garnish with scallions.
